messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.action:
Call the sendAdvertisePacket() of the Wireless Transceiver.
Start the time with the ADVERTISEMENT interval.

messages.name: ConnectReq
messages.action:
Stop the timer.
Store the ConnectReq:serverId in the serverId state variable.

messages.name: No
messages.action:
Call the rejectServer() function of the Wireless Transceiver.
Call the sendAdvertisePacket() of the Wireless Transceiver.
Start the time with the ADVERTISEMENT interval.

messages.name: DisconnectedInd
messages.action:
Call the sendAdvertisePacket() of the Wireless Transceiver.
Start the time with the ADVERTISEMENT interval.

messages.name: Timeout
messages.action:
Call the sendAdvertisePacket() of the Wireless Transceiver.
Start the time with the ADVERTISEMENT interval.

messages.name: Yes
messages.action:
Call the connectServer() function of the Wireless Transceiver with the received serverId.
Start the timer with the CONNECTION_TIMEOUT interval.

messages.name: Timeout
messages.action:
Call the sendAdvertisePacket() of the Wireless Transceiver.
Start the timer with the ADVERTISEMENT interval.

messages.name: ErrorInd
messages.action: Call the disable() function of the Wireless Transceiver.

components.description: Controls and establishes the connection with the server. It waits for the system to become ready and then starts advertising it presence on the network to be discoverable by a server.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.action:
Store the ReadyInd:numSounds in the numSounds state variable.
Call the initialize() function of the Touch Display.

messages.name: NewContentInd
messages.action:
Copy the NewContentInd:image and NewContentInd:touchMap in the image and touchMap state variables respectively.
Call the display() function of the Touch Display with the image as the parameter.

messages.name: TouchedInd
messages.action:
Call the unresponsive() function of the Touch Display.
Call the sendTouchEvent() function of the Wireless Tranceiver.

handlers.name: WirelessTransceiver
handlers.description: Takes care of receiving and transmitting data packets on the radio front-end by interfacing with the radio hardware peripheral.

functions.name: sendAdvertisePacket
functions.description: Send a single advertise packet to become discoverable.

parameters.description: The ID of the server to connect to.

functions.name: rejectServer
functions.description: Block furhter requests from the indicated server.

functions.name: sendTouchEvent

handlers.name: PeripheralHandler
handlers.description: Takes care of detecting, initializing and configuring hardware peripherals, e.g. by accessing low level drivers and serial communication lines.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start initialising and configuring the peripherals.

functions.name: unresponsive
functions.description: Disable the touch sensitivity to allow for handling the touch event first.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The PNG image to be displayed.

systemSpecification:
The system is a Wireless Interactive Networked Display (WIND) which controlled by a central server (not in scope). It operates by creating a connection to the server and then handling requests to display content formatted as a PNG image. Some content must be interactive which is enabled by the display being touch sensitive and the server sending an indexed coordinates map of touch-squares on the display. The system must be extremely low cost, so interaction is limited by the system mapping touch coordinates to the proper id and sending that id back to the server.

The system further has a speaker for supplying audio queues, which comprises a set of indexed predefined sounds. Each square on the touch-map can have a audio queue associated with it, specified by the index of the sound.
